description: Cryptographic Ed25519 audit receipts for every OpenClaw tool call. Compat floor is intentionally older than OpenClaw latest; see packages/signet-openclaw-plugin/README.md 'Compat range policy'.

keyName.description: Signet identity name in ~/.signet/identities/. The plugin shells out to the local `signet` CLI to sign with this key. The receipt's signer.owner is taken from the identity's stored metadata, not from this plugin config.

target.description: Logical target written into receipt.action.target verbatim. Signet policies match this string literally, so keep it stable across deployments to avoid silently dropping target-bound deny/approval rules.

signerOwner.description: DEPRECATED no-op. The receipt's signer.owner is taken from the identity metadata stored by `signet identity generate --name <name> --owner <owner>`. Kept in the schema so configs from earlier scaffolds still validate; remove it from your config when convenient.

policy.description: Optional path to a Signet policy YAML. If set and the policy denies a tool call, the plugin returns {block:true} from before_tool_call so OpenClaw skips execution.

trustBundle.description: Optional path to a Signet trust bundle YAML/JSON. Surfaced in the security audit collector so operators can confirm verifiers have an anchor.

auditDir.description: Override SIGNET_HOME for the audit log directory. Defaults to the CLI default (~/.signet).

passphraseEnv.description: Environment variable name that holds the keystore passphrase. Defaults to SIGNET_PASSPHRASE.

encryptParams.description: When true, store action.params encrypted in the audit log (XChaCha20-Poly1305 envelope keyed off the signing key).

signetBin.description: Path to the `signet` binary. Defaults to whatever is on PATH.

blockOnSignFailure.description: When true (default), a signing or policy failure aborts the tool call. When false, failures are logged and the call proceeds.

priority.description: Hook priority. Higher values run earlier. OpenClaw runs before_tool_call hooks in descending priority order.

allowDegraded.description: When true, a failed startup self-check puts the plugin into PASSIVE mode (tool calls run unsigned and unaudited until the operator fixes setup). The security audit collector reports signet:bypass=critical so the operator can see the plugin is not protecting anything. INCOMPATIBLE with `policy`: passive mode bypasses the signet sign call where policy evaluation runs, so that combination is rejected at register() time. Default false (fail-closed).

signetTimeoutMs.description: Hard timeout (ms) for any single signet CLI invocation. Default 5000. A hung signet binary aborts via AbortController and surfaces as SignetCliTimeoutError so the OpenClaw before_tool_call hook cannot stall.

reprobeIntervalMs.description: Min ms between background self-check probes when in PASSIVE mode. Default 30000. Recovery from passive -> active runs synchronously on the next before_tool_call after this interval (bounded by signetTimeoutMs).
